evals.prompt: Make a plan for the notifications feature
evals.expected_output: A plan.md with a status dashboard table and chunk descriptions, plus a sub-plan markdown file for each chunk containing a TDD plan with tests-first, implementation steps, and LLM verification.
assertions: A plan.md file was produced at docs/notifications/plan.md or similar
The plan contains a status dashboard table with columns for Auto Tests, LLM Verify, Human, Simplify, and Review
The plan identifies at least 3 chunks
Each chunk in the plan lists which other chunks it blocks (or explicitly notes it blocks none)
A sub-plan markdown file exists for every chunk listed in the main plan
Each sub-plan lists tests to write before implementation
Each sub-plan describes an LLM verification step or marks it N/A with a reason
The plan includes a branching strategy recommendation
